caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap with a yellow logo, appears in a small inset video window overlaid on a website. The website is a "List Randomizer" from "True Random Number Service" provided by "RANDOM.ORG." The screen displays a list of collectible items under "Part 1: Enter List Items," including entries like "(1) 2015 REDMOND HALL of Fame Icons Autograph #d 1-of-1" and "(1) 2011 RANDOM 2011 1/1 Auto." Below the list is a section titled "Part 2: Go!" with buttons for "Randomize," "Reset Form," and "Switch to Advanced Mode." A red banner at the bottom urges viewers to "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" and displays a YouTube "Subscribe" button next to the logo "WWW.JASYCASEBREAKS.COM." The man remains centered in his video window across the frames, maintaining a steady gaze toward the camera.
